name: tooling_bun_biome
description: Tooling — Biome (lint/format) and Bun (runtime/package manager). biome.json config, key rules, Bun scripts, pre-commit hooks, CI pipeline, migration with ESLint+Prettier. Activate with setup tooling, add a linter, or with questions «how configure Biome/Bun».
default_prompt: Use $tooling_bun_biome when the task matches the "Tooling (Bun + Biome) Beast Practices" skill.
